description: Here you'll find a more extensive view of my work history and the technology I'm comfortable with.

items.title: Fred Viktor
items.subTitle: Capital One Digital for Good Hackathon
items.description: Added an e-commerce shop to the existing website where users could 'purchase' supplies like hot meals and clothing for the homeless population in Toronto. This was done in 1 weekend, with 4 team members.

items.title: Toronto Cat Rescue
